Welcome to Pineapple Drinks Club

ORDER NOW

Premium beverage portfolio for horeca & retail. Explore brands, new arrivals and our brand services here.

OUR STORY

Welcome to Pineapple Drinks Club, or simply PDC. We’re an Amsterdam based Dutch drinks importer with a passion for exceptional spirits and premium cocktail ingredients.

Since 2017, we’ve been bringing unique liquids to the Dutch market, straight from boutique distilleries around the world. Ready to discover something new? Order online right away or get in touch with our team for our wholesale services.

We’re here to help you #DrinkDifferent

ORDER NOW
EXLUSIVE IMPORT

At PDC, we import and distribute exclusive brands with a unique narrative. Every single product is rooted in a passion for gastronomy and championed by people who prioritize quality and value sustainability.
